executives.name: Micael Johansson
executives.background: President and CEO since 2019. Joined Saab in 1985. Previously Senior Vice President and Deputy CEO. Holds a B.Sc. in Mathematics and Computer Science.

executives.name: Christian Luiga
executives.background: CFO and Deputy CEO. Joined Saab in 2020. Previously acting CEO and CFO at Telia Company. Holds a B.Sc. in Business Administration and Economics.

executives.name: Anders Carp
executives.background: Deputy CEO and Head of Group Channels. Joined Saab in 2001. Previously Head of Business Area Surveillance.

executives.name: Sebastian Carlsson
executives.background: Senior Vice President and Head of Group Communication. Joined Saab in 2012.

executives.name: Viktor Wallström
executives.background: Senior Vice President and Head of Group Communication and Sustainability. Joined Saab in 2022.

tenure_dates.title: Head of Group Communication and Sustainability

board_of_directors.name: Marcus Wallenberg
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board. Chairman of SEB and FAM. Board member of AstraZeneca and Investor AB.

board_of_directors.name: Bert Nordberg
board_of_directors.background: Deputy Chairman. Former Chairman of Vestas Wind Systems and CEO of Sony Mobile Communications.

board_of_directors.name: Lena Erixon
board_of_directors.background: Former Director General of the Swedish Transport Administration.

board_of_directors.name: Henrik Henriksson
board_of_directors.background: CEO of H2 Green Steel. Former CEO of Scania.

board_of_directors.name: Micael Johansson
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Saab AB.
